title: After the Japanese Oaks: An Oaken Queen?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I get first place in the Japanese Oaks! I was able
to run the entire 2,400 meters.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
However, it seems I pushed myself too far past my
limits, because I have to lie down and rest for a
while...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
The original plan was for me to run in the Shuka
Sho next, but Trainer tells me there's another race
I'd shine brighter at.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
We'll be tackling the G1 Sprinters Stakes. This
change means I'm going to be running against
senior-year racers!
